name: Sepulcrum
description: An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. This large, weighty double-barreled pistol delivers twin projectiles that pack a punch, exploding on impact. Secondary fire puts the weapon in lock-on mode. Aim to lock onto multiple targets, then fire to unleash homing projectiles.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: An ancient weapon designed by the Entrati. Primary fire siphons life essence from the target to fuel a devastating secondary fire. This large, weighty double-barreled pistol delivers twin projectiles that pack a punch, exploding on impact. Secondary fire puts the weapon in lock-on mode. Aim to lock onto multiple targets, then fire to unleash homing projectiles.

components.name: Seriglass Shard
components.description:
Once part of an intricate Entrati apparatus, now shattered and bearing a sharp edge.

Location: Grandmother in the Necralisk on Deimos

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed all weapons that require charge for alt-fire not gaining charges from kills obtained by damage over time (notably the Sepulcrum).

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Update 32.1
patchlogs.fixes: The Sepulcrum does not charge alt-fire from kills by DOT inflicted by the weapon.

patchlogs.name: Nidus Prime & Plague Star: Hotfix 30.7.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to engage the Sepulcrum’s Alt Fire mode while aiming.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the sound FX that the Sepulcrum plays when you’ve reached 5 kills transmitting to all other players in the squad, regardless of distance.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed cases of the Sepulcrum Alt Fire not properly targeting enemies.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Sepulcrums Alt Fire homing projectiles sometimes endlessly circling low profile targets like the Deimos Carnis enemy. 
Fixed Sepulcrum and Trumna local firing sounds playing for Clients.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.fixes: *Acquire the Blueprints and Components for the Sepulcrum from the Entrati Syndicate Weapons member!
